headline: TSMC posts strong April revenue growth driven by AI chip demand
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (NYSE:TSM) reported a solid increase in April revenue on Friday as continued demand for advanced artificial intelligence semiconductors supported sales growth. The world’s largest contract chip manufacturer said April revenue reached NT$410.

content.title: TSMC posts strong April revenue growth driven by AI chip demand
content.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (NYSE:TSM) reported a solid increase in April revenue on Friday as continued demand for advanced artificial intelligence semiconductors supported sales growth. The world’s largest contract chip manufacturer said April revenue reached NT$410.
